things.name: Grand Anse Beach
things.description: One of the Caribbean's finest beaches - 3km of white sand and calm turquoise water

things.name: Fort George
things.description: 18th-century British fort overlooking the famous horseshoe harbour of St George's

things.name: Annandale Falls
things.description: Lush waterfall in a botanical garden - swim in the pool

things.name: Underwater Sculpture Park
things.description: World's first underwater sculpture garden with 65 pieces beneath the Caribbean Sea

things.name: Gouyave Nutmeg Processing Station
things.description: Grenada is the world's second largest nutmeg producer - see it dried and sorted

things.name: Carenage Harbour
things.description: Picturesque inner harbour with colourful warehouses, yachts and fish vendors

things.name: Belmont Estate Cacao Plantation
things.description: Organic chocolate tour from bean to bar in a working cacao estate

things.name: St George's Market Square
things.description: Historic market square with a working fruit and spice market

things.name: Levera National Park
things.description: Leatherback sea turtle nesting beach and mangrove lagoon in the northeast

things.name: Oil Down (National Dish)
things.description: Grenada's national dish - breadfruit, salted meat and callaloo cooked in coconut milk
